price_velocity.rationale: Largest absolute net inflow in the dataset (+322k). cost_change_event already registering +0.1. Even against a 61.4% ownership base the sheer volume of transfers in (412k) signals imminent price rise tonight.
+58k net against a 14.2% ownership base is a high relative velocity signal. cost_change_event confirms +0.1. Budget mid with good fixtures (FDR 2 H) driving strong demand.

+29k net at only 4.1% ownership is a very high relative velocity (transfers in represent a large proportion of existing holders). cost_change_event confirms +0.1. Absolute volume is lower so medium confidence — price rise likely but timing could slip to next cycle.
+90k net is healthy but against a 48.9% base the relative velocity is moderate. cost_change_event is 0.0 — no price movement expected tonight. Hold comfortably.
+8k net is marginal. cost_change_event 0.0. No price movement expected. Monitor only.

-140k net transfers is the largest negative flow in the dataset. Status is doubtful (chance_next 75%). cost_change_event already at -0.1. Price drop tonight is near-certain. Sell immediately to avoid the hit.

act_now.reason: Doubtful fitness + -140k net transfers + cost_change_event -0.1 confirmed. Price drop tonight is near-certain. Act before the deadline.

summary: Three players are predicted to rise in GW38: Haaland (high confidence, +322k net), Mbeumo (high confidence, +58k vs small 14.2% base), and Rogers (medium confidence, +29k vs tiny 4.1% base). One fall is predicted with high confidence: Gabriel (-140k net, doubtful status, cost_change -0.1 already registering). The single most urgent action is to sell Gabriel before tonight's price drop locks in a financial loss. M.Salah and Mateta are stable — hold.
